strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Public technical leadership via talks, workshops, and courses (TDD, Selenium, web internals)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published AI products, or platform-level AI work
Career level is Senior/Staff IC; limited evidence of Director-level strategic influence or advising executive customers
No advanced degree in AI and no cloud/AI builder credentials beyond general AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, versatile software craftsman with strong full-stack, testing, and open-source credentials, plus founder experience via GISCollective. However, the role targets a Director-level AI strategist with recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products, which the resume does not substantiate beyond recent MCP/agent tooling work. Cloud and AI builder fluency, advanced AI education, and executive-level advisory experience appear limited relative to the role's expectations.
